title: ‘Much‐needed fresh air’: 5 outcomes from the world’s first summit on ending fossil fuels
description: The Santa Marta climate talks showed many countries want to move ahead with plans to end the use of fossil fuels, once and for all.

title: This ancient Chinese megacity hides mysterious underground tunnels buried for over 4,000 years
description: A huge ancient stone city buried for thousands of years in northern China has just become even more mysterious. Archaeologists working at the Houchengzui Stone City in Inner Mongolia have uncovered a hidden underground tunnel network dating back roughly 4,300 to 4,500 years.
